subcategory.title: Ski Rental
subcategory.description: Rent your skis here for your ski trip in Switzerland. You can easily choose your skis online and rent them for your individual period. This way you can travel to your ski resort in a very relaxed way. You pick up the skis including equipment for your winter vacation usually very close to the valley station of the mountain railroads or at the location of your choice. This way you always get top quality and have the choice between different models, brands and sizes.
